title: caprifolium ciliatum
intro: Caprifolium ciliatum, also known as the Himalayan honeysuckle or silver vine, is a perennial climbing plant native to the Himalayas and other parts of Asia, characterized by its fragrant flowers and silver-green foliage. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its ability to relieve anxiety and stress due to its high content of actinidine, a natural anxiolytic compound. The health benefits of Caprifolium ciliatum include its potential to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of ADHD and autism. Caprifolium ciliatum can be prepared as a herbal supplement, tea, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to support mental well-being and promote relaxation.
